title: croton polygamus
intro: Croton polygamus, also known as the Croton plant or Panicled Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton polygamus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal remedies such as infusions, ointments, and salves.
